feed.title: Franklin County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not registry-specific. [STALE: source last verified 2026-07-12T13:53:37.642579+00:00; 1 consecutive fetch failure since — items below may be out of date.]

entry.title: Monitoring started: Franklin County Registry of Deeds
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
